page.content: In December 2023, Salesforce's Enterprise license revenue included an annual revenue of CHF50M from 100,000 Enterprise Licenses, generating 5,000 new licenses and achieving a retention rate of 95%, contributing to a total revenue of CHF200M.

lines.text: In December 2023, Salesforce's Enterprise license revenue included an annual revenue of CHF50M from 100,000 Enterprise
Licenses, generating 5,000 new licenses and achieving a retention rate of 95%, contributing to a total revenue of CHF200M.

page.content: Additionally, the SMB Licenses accounted for CHF30M, with 50,000 licenses and 2,000 new licenses at a retention rate of 90%, resulting in a total revenue of CHF100M. The AI/ML model deployment metrics forecast for 2023 includes a revenue of 150M CHF, with a year-over-year change of 10.5%, a market share of 25%, and a percentage change of 15%.

lines.text: Additionally, the SMB Licenses accounted for CHF30M, with 50,000 licenses and 2,000 new licenses at a retention rate of
90%, resulting in a total revenue of CHF100M. The AI/ML model deployment metrics forecast for 2023 includes a revenue of
150M CHF, with a year-over-year change of 10.5%, a market share of 25%, and a percentage change of 15%.

page.content: The cost savings from deployment are projected at 50M CHF with a year-over-year change of 20%, an actual figure of 12M CHF, and a percentage change of 8%. Customer growth is estimated at 2,000, with a year-over-year change of 15%, an actual figure of 1,750, and a percentage change of 10%. Deployment speed is forecasted at 30 days, with a year-over-year change of 5%, an actual figure of 28 days, and a percentage change of 7%. Finally, user satisfaction is projected at 90%, showing a year-over-year change of 3%, an actual figure of 87%, and a percentage change of 5%.
